description: Töltsd ki az üres helyeket a „to have” ige helyes alakjával! (have / has / don't have / doesn't have)

items.sentence: I ______ a big dog.
She ______ blue eyes

They ______ a lot of time
You ______ a nice phone.
The laptop is old. It ______ a good battery.
Peter ______ a job. He is happy.
I am poor. I ______ money.
She ______ a sister. She is an only child.
Mark and David ______ a meeting now.
This office ______ a big screen.
You look busy. Do you ______ time for a coffee?
We ______ a problem with the computer.
He ______ a pen. Can you give him one?
They are rich. They ______ a beautiful house.
My phone is dead. It ______ a good battery.
I ______ a key to this office. Can you open it?
She ______ a very nice manager.
The house ______ four rooms.
We are hungry but we ______ food.
I ______ a question about the project.
He ______ a new laptop for work.
Mary is lonely. She ______ any friends here.
They ______ a big dog in their garden.
You ______ a beautiful smile.
The car is empty. It ______ petrol.
We ______ a holiday in July.
He ______ a brother and a sister.
I ______ a laptop. I only use a telephone.

This book ______ many interesting pages.

We ______ a clean office.
She ______ a black pen in her bag.
I ______ a problem with my telephone screen.
You ______ a meeting with the boss today.
The dog ______ blue eyes. It is beautiful.
He ______ any money in his pocket.

You ______ a problem. I can help you.
